37db9276-37bf-4592-92fb-409a5658ec16.label: Becoming Heavily Involved in Student Activism

children.text: In this clip, Montejano discusses how she became involved in the Chicano Movement. She describes her participation in the Crystal City Boycotts and how she discovered the Brown Berets.

citation: "Becoming Heavily Involved in Student Activism," from Diana Montejano Oral History Interview with Steve Arionus and Vinicio Sinta,  June 29, 2016, San Antonio, Civil Rights in Black and Brown Interview Database, https://crbb.tcu.edu/clips/4218/becoming-heavily-involved-in-student-activism, accessed May 09, 2026.
label: 10. Becoming Heavily Involved in Student Activism
